notes: Alcohol can be brought into the UAE in limited quantities with strict local rules
Food can be brought into the UAE but some items are restricted by health or religious rules
There is no limit on bringing cash into the UAE, but amounts over AED 60,000 must be declared.
Duty-free allowances apply in the UAE for alcohol, tobacco, and goods within set limits.
Personal electronics can be brought into the UAE, but high-value items may be subject to declaration.
Medication can be brought into the UAE, but many drugs are strictly controlled and require prior approval.
Tobacco can be brought into the UAE within duty-free limits for personal use.
Weapons are strictly prohibited from being brought into the UAE without special authorization.
Prescription drugs can be carried into the UAE, but many are controlled and require prior approval.
You must declare certain goods when entering the UAE, especially cash, restricted items, and goods above limits.
